content.intro: Landlords are the property owners you manage properties for. Adding landlord records allows you to link them to properties, manage their AML (Anti-Money Laundering) checks, and store their bank details for rent payments.

steps.title: Navigate to Landlords
steps.content: Click 'Landlords' in the sidebar to open the Landlords page.

steps.title: Click 'Add Landlord'
steps.content: Click the 'Add Landlord' button in the top right corner.

steps.title: Select landlord type
steps.content: Check the 'Is landlord a company?' box if the landlord is a corporate entity rather than an individual.

steps.title: Enter personal details
steps.content: For individuals: select title (Mr, Mrs, Miss, Ms, Dr), enter first name, middle name (optional), and last name. For companies: enter the company name.

steps.title: Add contact information
steps.content: Enter the landlord's email address and phone number.

steps.title: Enter address
steps.content: Fill in the landlord's correspondence address.

steps.title: Add bank details (optional)
steps.content: If you handle rent payments, enter the landlord's bank account name, account number, and sort code.

steps.title: Save the landlord
steps.content: Click 'Save Landlord' to create the record.

sections.title: Bulk Import
sections.content: You can import multiple landlords at once using 'Import CSV'. Download the template to see the required column format.

sections.title: Linking Properties
sections.content: After adding a landlord, you can link them to properties. Go to the landlord's detail page and click 'Link Property', or edit a property and assign the landlord from there.
